traits.name: Flyby
traits.desc: The wasp doesn't provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Sting
actions.desc:
*Melee Weapon Attack:* +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. 
***Hit:*** 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage. 
The target must make a DC 11 Constitution saving throw, taking the poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. 
If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hit points, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

monsters.name: Half-Dragon
monsters.senses: blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 15

traits.name: Draconic Origin
traits.desc: Choose one: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison. The half-dragon gains resistance to that damage type.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The half-dragon makes two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) slashing + 7 (2d6) damage of the chosen type.

actions.name: Dragon’s Breath (Recharge 5–6)
actions.desc: Exhales in a 30-foot cone. DC 14 Dex save. 28 (8d6) damage of the chosen type on failure, half on success.

monsters.name: Glow Toad
monsters.damage_resistances: poison, bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical weapons
monsters.languages: understands Common and Sylvan but can’t speak

traits.name: Colorful Skin
traits.desc: The glow toad changes color depending on its mood: Yellow (regular), Pink (happy), Red (angry), Purple (guilty), Blue (concerned), Green (afraid).

traits.name: Illumination
traits.desc: As a bonus action, the glow toad can shed dim light in a 10-foot radius or extinguish the light.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: The glow toad has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Lick
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Light Flash (Recharge 5–6)
actions.desc: The glow toad emits a fierce light from the dark spots on its body. Each creature in a 15-foot cone must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or become blinded until the end of the glow toad’s next turn.

actions.name: Invisibility
actions.desc: The glow toad magically turns invisible until it attacks or uses its Light Flash, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the glow toad wears or carries is invisible with it.

traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.desc:
The goblin hexer casts one of the following spells, using Intelligence as its spellcasting ability (spell save DC 13):
• At will: minor illusion
• 1/day each: blindness/deafness, faerie fire, grease

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The goblin hexer makes two Hex Stick attacks. It can replace one of these attacks with a use of Spellcasting.

actions.name: Hex Stick
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) psychic damage.

reactions.name: Jinx
reactions.desc: Trigger: A creature the goblin hexer can see hits it with an attack roll. The triggering creature must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, the attack misses.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The goblin boss makes two attacks, using its Scimitar or Shortbow in any combination.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage. If the attack roll had advantage, the target takes an extra 2 (1d4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage. If the attack roll had advantage, the target takes an extra 2 (1d4) piercing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Nimble Escape
bonus_actions.desc: The goblin boss takes the Disengage or Hide action.

reactions.name: Redirect Attack
reactions.desc: Trigger: A creature the goblin boss can see makes an attack roll against it. The goblin boss chooses a Small or Medium ally within 5 feet. The goblin boss and that ally swap places, and the ally becomes the target of the attack instead.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage. If the attack roll had advantage, the target takes an extra 2 (1d4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage. If the attack roll had advantage, the target takes an extra 2 (1d4) piercing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Nimble Escape
bonus_actions.desc: The goblin warrior takes the Disengage or Hide action.

actions.name: Dagger
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Nimble Escape
bonus_actions.desc: The goblin minion takes the Disengage or Hide action.

traits.name: Parry
traits.desc: When the noble is hit by a melee attack, it can use its reaction to add 3 to its AC for that attack, potentially causing the attack to miss.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The noble makes two Gold-Tinted Sword attacks.

actions.name: Gold-Tinted Sword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) slashing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Summon Sword
bonus_actions.desc: The noble magically summons the Gold-Tinted Sword to its hand. The sword appears instantly in its grasp.

bonus_actions.name: Leap
bonus_actions.desc: The noble jumps up to 30 feet in any direction, costing 10 feet of movement. It must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity check or fall prone and slide an extra 5 feet in the direction it jumped from.

monsters.name: Thrumbo
monsters.damage_resistances: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
monsters.senses: blindsight 60 ft., darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 12

traits.name: Charge
traits.desc: If the Thrumbo moves at least 30 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a Horn Slash attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 10 (3d6) slashing damage.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: The Thrumbo has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.desc: The Thrumbo has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put it to sleep.

traits.name: Indomitable (2/Day)
traits.desc: The Thrumbo can reroll a failed saving throw. It must use the new roll.

traits.name: Ice Aura
traits.desc: Any creature that comes within 5 feet of the Thrumbo takes 1d6 cold damage. A creature takes 1d6 cold damage every turn it starts its turn within the aura. The aura also wards off any nonmagical fire attacks.

traits.name: Regeneration
traits.desc: The Thrumbo regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn. If it takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of its next turn. The Thrumbo dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesn't regenerate.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The Thrumbo makes three attacks: two with its horn and one with Stomp.

actions.name: Horn Slash
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) cold damage.

actions.name: Stomp
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) cold damage.

actions.name: Cone of Cold (3/Day)
actions.desc: The Thrumbo exhales a blast of cold air in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 28 (8d6) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature killed by this effect becomes a frozen statue until it thaws.

legendary_actions.name: Aura Explosion (Costs 2 Actions)
legendary_actions.desc: The Thrumbo's magical aura surges. Each creature within 10 feet of it must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw, taking 15 (2d10 + 4) cold damage and being knocked back 5 feet on a failed save. On a successful save, the creature takes half the damage and is not knocked back.

legendary_actions.name: Horn Slash
legendary_actions.desc: The Thrumbo makes one Horn Slash attack.

legendary_actions.name: Move
legendary_actions.desc: The Thrumbo moves up to half its speed (20 ft.) in any direction.

monsters.name: Dusk
monsters.skills: Acrobatics +6, Perception +3, Investigation +4, Sleight of Hand +6, Stealth +8

traits.name: Sneak Attack (Assassin)
traits.desc: Once per turn, Dusk deals an extra 14 (4d6) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of Dusk that isn't incapacitated and Dusk doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

traits.name: Cunning Action
traits.desc: As a bonus action, Dusk can take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

traits.name: Assassinate
traits.desc: During its first turn, Dusk has advantage on attack rolls against any creature that hasn't taken a turn. Any hit Dusk scores against a surprised creature is a critical hit.

traits.name: Sessiz Suikast Training
traits.desc: Dusk fights with eerie competence and efficiency. No wasted motion.

actions.name: Twin Daggers
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) piercing damage.

monsters.name: Clockwork Beetle Swarm
monsters.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, stunned

traits.name: Construct Nature
traits.desc: The swarm doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: The swarm has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Swarm
traits.desc: The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and it can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny construct. The swarm can’t regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

actions.name: Bites
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 0 ft., one target in the swarm’s space. Hit: 18 (4d8) piercing damage, or 9 (2d8) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer, plus 3 (1d6) poison damage.

monsters.name: Clockwork Abomination
monsters.damage_resistances: acid, cold, fire; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
monsters.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned

traits.name: Construct Nature
traits.desc: The clockwork abomination doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

traits.name: Explosive Infernal Power Source
traits.desc: When the clockwork abomination is destroyed, its infernal battery explodes. Each creature within 10 feet of it must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The explosion ignites flammable objects in the area that aren’t being worn or carried.

traits.name: Immutable Form
traits.desc: The clockwork abomination is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: The clockwork abomination has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Unstoppable
traits.desc: Moving through difficult terrain doesn’t cost the clockwork abomination extra movement, and its speed can’t be reduced.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The clockwork abomination makes one Bite attack and one Slam attack.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5–6)
actions.desc: The clockwork abomination exhales fire in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

monsters.name: Clockwork Beetle
monsters.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned
monsters.languages: understands the languages of its creator but can’t speak

traits.name: Construct Nature
traits.desc: The clockwork beetle doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

traits.name: Immutable Form
traits.desc: The clockwork beetle is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

traits.name: Limited Telepathy
traits.desc: The clockwork beetle can magically transmit simple messages and images to its owner, provided the owner is within 100 feet of it.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: The clockwork beetle has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

monsters.name: Clockwork Hound
monsters.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned

traits.name: Construct Nature
traits.desc: The clockwork hound doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

traits.name: Diligent Tracker
traits.desc: The clockwork hound has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) and Wisdom (Survival) checks that rely on scent or that are made to find a creature.

traits.name: Explosive Core
traits.desc: When the clockwork hound is destroyed, its core explodes. Each creature within 5 feet of it must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

traits.name: Immutable Form
traits.desc: The clockwork hound is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: The clockwork hound has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d10 + 3) piercing damage.

actions.name: Tripping Tongue
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) slashing damage. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

monsters.name: Clockwork Huntsman
monsters.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned

traits.name: Construct Nature
traits.desc: The clockwork huntsman doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

traits.name: Explosive Core
traits.desc: When the clockwork huntsman is destroyed, its core explodes. Each creature within 5 feet of it must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

traits.name: Immutable Form
traits.desc: The clockwork huntsman is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: The clockwork huntsman has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The clockwork huntsman makes one Slam attack and two Longsword attacks. It can replace its Slam attack with a Net Cannon attack.

actions.name: Longsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Net Cannon (4/Day)
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 10/20 ft., one target. Hit: If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is restrained. A mechanism within the clockwork huntsman’s chest can fire a net with a 20-foot trailing cable anchored within its chest. A creature, including the restrained creature, can take its action to free the restrained creature by succeeding on a DC 10 Strength check. Alternatively, dealing 5 slashing damage to the net (AC 10) frees the creature. Alternatively, a character can attack the net with advantage, dealing the same damage to the person trapped as to the netting.

bonus_actions.name: Reel
bonus_actions.desc: The clockwork huntsman pulls a creature restrained by its net up to 15 feet straight toward it.

monsters.name: Clockwork Myrmidon
monsters.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned

traits.name: Construct Nature
traits.desc: The clockwork myrmidon doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

traits.name: Alchemical Fireball
traits.desc: When the clockwork myrmidon is destroyed, its alchemical reservoir explodes. Each creature within 10 feet of it must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. This explosion doesn’t occur if the myrmidon has already used its Alchemical Flame Jet four times.

traits.name: Immutable Form
traits.desc: The clockwork myrmidon is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: The clockwork myrmidon has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The clockwork myrmidon makes one Slam attack and two War Pick attacks. It can replace both War Pick attacks with one use of its Alchemical Flame Jet.

actions.name: War Pick
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing damage.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (1d12 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Alchemical Flame Jet (4/Day)
actions.desc: The clockwork myrmidon spews a jet of alchemical fire in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in the line must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

bonus_actions.name: Grease Spray (4/Day)
bonus_actions.desc: The clockwork myrmidon fires a spray of alchemical grease at a point on the ground within 30 feet. The grease covers a 10-foot square centered on that point and becomes difficult terrain. Each creature standing in the area must succeed on a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone. A creature that enters the area or ends its turn there must also succeed on a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone.

monsters.name: Clockwork Watchman
monsters.condition_immunities: charmed, exhaustion, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned

traits.name: Construct Nature
traits.desc: The clockwork watchman doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

traits.name: Immutable Form
traits.desc: The clockwork watchman is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.desc: The clockwork watchman has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The clockwork watchman makes one Halberd attack and one Slam attack, or it makes two Halberd attacks.

actions.name: Halberd
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) slashing damage.

actions.name: Slam
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Net Cannon (4/Day)
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 10/20 ft., one target. Hit: If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is restrained. A creature, including the restrained creature, can take its action to free the restrained creature by succeeding on a DC 10 Strength check. Alternatively, dealing 5 slashing damage to the net (AC 10) frees the creature.

bonus_actions.name: Reel
bonus_actions.desc: The clockwork watchman pulls a creature restrained by its net up to 15 feet straight toward it.

traits.name: Keen Smell
traits.desc: The giant ant queen has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

traits.name: Queen’s Scent
traits.desc: Giant ants within 30 feet of the queen have advantage on attack rolls against any creature that attacked the queen within the last minute.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The giant ant queen makes two Bite attacks and one Sting attack.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the giant ant queen can’t Bite a different target.

actions.name: Sting
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage. The target must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

traits.name: Nimble Escape
traits.desc: The goblin arcane duelist can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

traits.name: Martial Focus
traits.desc: The goblin arcane duelist can use a weapon as an arcane focus.

actions.name: Scimitar
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage.

actions.name: Shocking Grasp (Cantrip)
actions.desc:
**2024 Version**
Lightning springs from the duelist to a creature it tries to touch. Melee spell attack: +4 to hit. Hit: 1d8 lightning damage, and the target can’t make opportunity attacks until the start of its next turn.

(Cantrip scales: 2d8 at 5th level, 3d8 at 11th, 4d8 at 17th)

actions.name: Fire Bolt (Cantrip)
actions.desc:
**2024 Version**
The duelist hurls a mote of fire at a creature or object within 120 feet. Ranged spell attack: +4 to hit. Hit: 1d10 fire damage.

(Cantrip scales: 2d10 at 5th level, 3d10 at 11th, 4d10 at 17th)

actions.name: Mage Armor (1st level)
actions.desc:
**2024 Version**
The duelist touches a willing creature. For 8 hours, the target’s base AC becomes 13 + its Dexterity modifier. The spell ends if the duelist casts it again or if the target dons armor.

actions.name: Shield (1st level)
actions.desc:
**2024 Version**
Reaction when hit by an attack or targeted by Magic Missile. The duelist gains +5 AC until the start of its next turn (including against the triggering attack) and takes no damage from Magic Missile.

actions.name: Ice Knife (1st level)
actions.desc:
**2024 Version**
The duelist creates a shard of ice and throws it at a target within 60 feet. Ranged spell attack: +4 to hit. Hit: 1d10 piercing damage. Whether it hits or misses, the shard then explodes. Each creature within 5 feet of the target must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d6 cold damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success.

actions.name: Mirror Image (2nd level)
actions.desc:
**2024 Version**
Three illusory duplicates appear around the duelist for 1 minute. Each time a creature targets the duelist with an attack, roll a d6. On a 1–3, one duplicate is destroyed instead. The spell ends when all duplicates are gone.

actions.name: Hold Person (2nd level)
actions.desc:
**2024 Version**
Choose a humanoid the duelist can see within 60 feet. The target must succeed on a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw or be Paralyzed for up to 1 minute (concentration). The target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns.

actions.name: Dagger
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

traits.name: Aggressive
traits.desc: As a bonus action, the raider - orc berserker can move up to its speed toward a hostile creature that it can see.

traits.name: Bloodied Courage
traits.desc: When on 50 percent HP or less AND inspired by a higher ranking BERSERKER, attacks on the raider have advantage and it gains advantage on its attacks.

actions.name: Crude Cleaving Sword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.

traits.name: Aggressive
traits.desc: As a bonus action, the raider - orc berserker can move up to its speed toward a hostile creature that it can see.

traits.name: Bloodied Courage
traits.desc: When on 50 percent HP or less AND inspired by a higher ranking BERSERKER, attacks on the raider have advantage and it gains advantage on its attacks.

traits.name: Tribal Courage
traits.desc: When benefitting from Bloodied Courage and within 10 feet of another Savage or higher ranking Orc, attacks against the Savage do not have advantage.

actions.name: Crude Cleaving Sword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Inspire
bonus_actions.desc: Grants the inspiration needed for Bloodied Courage to activate on lower ranking Orcs.

traits.name: Wolf's Rage
traits.desc: While Wolf's Rage is active, allies have advantage on attack rolls against targets within 5 ft. of this creature.

traits.name: Bloodied Courage
traits.desc: When on 50 percent HP or less AND inspired by a higher ranking BERSERKER, attacks on the raider have advantage and it gains advantage on its attacks.

actions.name: Double-handed Cleaving Sword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 24 (3d12 + 5) slashing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Inspire
bonus_actions.desc: Grants the inspiration needed for Bloodied Courage to activate on lower ranking Orcs.

bonus_actions.name: Wolf's Rage
bonus_actions.desc: The marauder activates Wolf's Rage, which lasts for 6 turns. It has 2 uses.

traits.name: Dragon Resistance
traits.desc: The kobold has resistance to a type of damage based on the color of dragon that invested it with power (choose or roll a d10): 1-2 acid (black), 3-4 cold (white), 5-6 fire (red), 7-8 lightning (blue), 9-10 poison (green).

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.desc: The kobold champion has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the kobold champion's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

traits.name: Inspiring Presence
traits.desc: Other kobolds within 30 feet of the kobold champion can't be frightened and will not retreat, fighting to the death so long as the champion isn't incapacitated.

traits.name: Underdog
traits.desc: If the kobold champion is fighting a creature of larger size than it, it deals an additional 7 (2d6) damage on any of its attacks. Also, if the kobold champion is reduced to 0 hit points, it can instantly recover to 1 hit point once per long rest.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The kobold champion makes two attacks with its Rapier or Shortbow.

actions.name: Rapier
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage. If the target is larger than the kobold, add 7 (2d6) piercing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage. If the target is larger than the kobold, add 7 (2d6) piercing damage.

actions.name: Staff
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +0 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6 + 0) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Greater Koboldian Healing (1/Day)
actions.desc: The kobold activates a concentration spell that heals 3d6 hit points to one target. This spell cannot be moved between creatures.

actions.name: Koboldian Healing Word
actions.desc: A creature of the kobold's choice that it can see within range regains hit points equal to 1d4 + 3 (Wisdom modifier).

reactions.name: Shield (1/Day)
reactions.desc: When hit by an attack or targeted by Magic Missile, the kobold gains +5 AC until the start of its next turn (including against the triggering attack) and takes no damage from Magic Missile.
